sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
The **Domo connector** integrates with Domo via the Domo REST API. It enables Shielva to sync datasets, dashboard pages, and users from your Domo instance.

This connector uses **OAuth2 client credentials** — your Client ID and Client Secret are exchanged for a short-lived Bearer token before every sync or health check. No user interaction is required after the initial setup.

**Key capabilities:**
- Sync all Domo datasets with row/column counts, owner, and status
- Sync all dashboard pages (including parent hierarchy and card counts)
- Sync users with role, department, and title
- Stable document IDs via `sha256('<type>:<id>')[:16]` for deduplication across syncs
- Retry with exponential backoff on transient errors (skips retry on auth/not-found)

children.title: Supported Operations
children.content:
| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `install()` | Validates client_id + client_secret; returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE/MISSING_CREDENTIALS |
| `health_check()` | Acquires token via `GET /oauth/token`, then calls `list_users(limit=1)` to verify connectivity |
| `sync()` | Paginates all datasets and dashboard pages; normalizes each to ConnectorDocument |
| `list_datasets()` | Returns all Domo datasets (auto-paginates with offset) |
| `list_pages()` | Returns all Domo dashboard pages (auto-paginates with offset) |
| `list_users()` | Returns all Domo users (auto-paginates with offset) |
| `get_dataset(id)` | Returns a single dataset by ID |
| `get_page(id)` | Returns a single dashboard page by ID |

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content:
Domo uses **OAuth2 client credentials flow** (no user redirect required).

**Token endpoint:**
```
GET https://api.domo.com/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials&scope=data%20user%20dashboard
Authorization: Basic base64(client_id:client_secret)
```

Response:
```json
{"access_token": "...", "expires_in": 3600, "token_type": "bearer"}
```

All subsequent API calls include:
```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

Tokens expire in 1 hour. The connector re-acquires a fresh token before each `sync()` and `health_check()` call.

children.title: Install Fields
children.content:
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `client_id` | string | Yes | Domo API client ID from developer.domo.com |
| `client_secret` | password | Yes | Domo API client secret |

sections.title: Pagination
sections.content:
All list endpoints use `limit` + `offset` parameters. Responses are plain JSON arrays (not wrapped objects).

- Datasets: `limit=50` per page
- Pages: `limit=50` per page
- Users: `limit=500` per page
- Groups: `limit=500` per page

The connector continues paginating until a batch returns fewer items than the page size.

sections.title: Document Normalization
sections.content:
All resources are converted to `ConnectorDocument` instances with stable IDs:

| Resource | ID formula | `type` field |
|----------|-----------|---------------|
| Dataset | `sha256('dataset:' + str(id))[:16]` | `dataset` |
| Page | `sha256('page:' + str(id))[:16]` | `dashboard` |
| User | `sha256('user:' + str(id))[:16]` | `user` |

Stable IDs ensure the same Domo resource always maps to the same Shielva document, enabling deduplication and incremental updates.

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content:
| Exception | HTTP Status | Behavior |
|-----------|-------------|----------|
| `DomoAuthError` | 401, 403 | Not retried — requires credential refresh |
| `DomoNotFoundError` | 404 | Not retried — resource does not exist |
| `DomoRateLimitError` | 429 | Retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff |
| `DomoNetworkError` | (connection error) | Retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff |
| `DomoError` | Other 4xx/5xx | Retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff |
